mapper.sql: A.CNSLT_ID AS cnsltId , A.CNSLT_SJ AS cnsltSj , A.CNSLT_CN AS cnsltCn , A.OTHBC_AT AS othbcAt , A.EMAIL_ADRES AS emailAdres , A.EMAIL_ANSWER_AT AS emailAnswerAt , A.AREA_NO AS areaNo , A.FRST_REGISTER_ID AS frstRegisterId , TO_CHAR(A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS frstRegisterPnttm , (SELECT M.USER_NM FROM VW_USER_MASTER M WHERE M.ESNTL_ID = A.FRST_REGISTER_ID) AS emplyrNm
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM TB_CNSLT_LIST A WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY A.FRST_REGIST_PNTTM DESC LIMIT #{recordCountPerPage} OFFSET #{firstIndex}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_CNSLT_LIST A WHERE 1=1
SELECT , A.CNSLT_CN AS answerCn FROM TB_CNSLT_LIST A WHERE A.CNSLT_ID = #{cnsltId}
